name: feature.app-builder.nodes
description: App-builder canvas producer node pack (ADR 0153 Phase 2). The `render` node emits a typed `canvas.app-builder` artifact — a structured app design { name, screens[], connectors[] } with a component tree per screen — that flows through the run-output producer (ADR 0083) and renders inline in the chat artifact workbench. Constrained typed JSON, never executable code; pure transform; replay-safe.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Render app design
nodes.description: Emit a `canvas.app-builder` artifact. Inputs: { app } (or `source` JSON) = { name, description?, theme?, screens: [{ id, name, route?, isInitial?, components: [tree] }], connectors?: [{ from, to, trigger?, label? }] }. Components reference the host app-builder catalog by `type`. Output: a typed canvas.app-builder artifact. Pure transform.
